discoverability.baseline_changes: MAJOR: The discoverability baseline from run 2 is now STALE. Our site has deployed llms.txt, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, meta description, Open Graph tags, Twitter Card tags, keywords meta, and schema.org ClaimReview structured data since the baseline was recorded. The baseline recorded all of these as 'missing' — they are now all present. A new baseline should be written.

action_items.details: The baseline in discoverability-baseline.json records our llms.txt, sitemap, robots.txt, meta tags, OG tags, and ClaimReview as 'missing'. All are now present and deployed. The baseline needs to be rewritten to reflect the current state so future runs can detect regressions.

notes: QUIET RUN relative to run 2. No new significant developments since earlier today.
